logs.heading: A0: Determining days and starting GChat sync task
logs.content:
{
    "thoughts": [
        "User wants me to run a GChat sync task based on today's weekday.",
        "Current date is 2026-03-27. Let me determine the day of week: March 27, 2026 falls on a Friday.",
        "Based on the rules: Tuesday-Saturday = DAYS=2, so I should use DAYS=2.",
        "I need to run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 2",
        "Then monitor the debug log up to 10 times with 30-second intervals",
        "On completion/failure, send appropriate notifications using the notify_user skill"
    ],
    "headline": "Determining days and starting GChat sync task",
    "tool_name": "code_execution_tool",
    "tool_args": {
        "runtime": "terminal",
        "session": 0,
        "reset": false,
        "code": "python /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts/gchat_reader.py --days 2"
    }
}

I need to run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 2
